info.title: Matching Man API
info.description:
Multi-tenant matchmaking platform API.

Game servers authenticate with a project API key (`projectApiKey`) issued via `POST /v1/projects/:projectId/api-keys`.
The admin dashboard authenticates with a per-user session token from `/v1/auth/login` or `/v1/auth/register`, or the break-glass `DASHBOARD_ADMIN_TOKEN` (`sessionToken`).

sessionToken.description: Dashboard session token or admin token, e.g. `Authorization: Bearer <session_token>`.

organizationName.description: Personal organization created for this user.

email.description: The invitee must already be registered.

requiredSlots.description: Total player slots across the match.

groupCount.description: Number of opposing groups (e.g. 2 for teams A/B).

initialRatingWindow.description: Initial rating band width for candidate matching.

windowExpandIntervalSeconds.description: Seconds between each rating window expansion.

winnerGroupIndex.description: Index of the winning group; omit for a draw.
